sections.heading: Overview
sections.body: The Pine Labs SDK communicates with a Pine Labs POS terminal via **app-to-app IPC** with the on-device MasterApp (`com.pinelabs.masterapp`). The SDK uses Android's `Messenger` + JSON payload pattern — no TCP, Bluetooth, or network configuration is required.

sections.heading: How Binding Works
sections.body:
The SDK binds to MasterApp lazily — on the first `doTransaction` call, not at `init` time.

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Bind action | `com.pinelabs.masterapp.SERVER` |
| Package | `com.pinelabs.masterapp` |
| Bind flags | `BIND_AUTO_CREATE` |
| Reply channel | Private `Messenger` backed by SDK-owned `HandlerThread` |

Binding is transparent to the caller. Transport-related failures surface as `TransportUnavailable` in `onFailure`.

sections.heading: Request / Response Wire Format
Timeout
sections.body: The `timeoutSecs` parameter in `init` (default `60`, range `1..600`) controls the full bind → reply window. If no reply arrives within that window, `onFailure` is called with a `Timeout` error. Raise `timeoutSecs` if transactions are timing out on slow terminals.

sections.heading: Troubleshooting
sections.body:
| Symptom | Likely cause | Fix |
|---------|-------------|-----|
| `TransportUnavailable("MasterApp service not available")` | MasterApp not installed or `<queries>` stripped from manifest. | Install MasterApp; remove `tools:node="remove"` on any `<queries>` element. |
| `Timeout` on every transaction | Terminal busy, PED stall, or `timeoutSecs` too low. | Retry; raise `timeoutSecs`; check terminal home screen. |
| `UnsatisfiedLinkError: libuniffi_pinelabs.so not found` | ABI filter missing. | Add `ndk { abiFilters 'arm64-v8a', 'armeabi-v7a', 'x86_64' }` to `build.gradle`. |
